title: lucuma elongata
intro: Lucuma elongata, also known as the Peruvian lucuma or Lucuma tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. The plant's bark and seeds have been traditionally used in folk medicine in South America for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. Lucuma elongata is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Lucuma elongata can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and capsules, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
